news.t: Matthews Launches Five New Active ETFs to Provide Greater Customization in Emerging Markets

holdings.infoBox: JPAN is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tokyo Electron stock at 5.92%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 4.72%, Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group at 3.37%, Shin-Etsu Chemical at 3.35%, and Recruit Holdings at 3.17%.

overview.description: The Matthews Japan Active ETF (JPAN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects Japanese companies capable of sustainable growth based on fundamentals while considering ESG. The fund follows an all-cap approach while implementing a high-conviction growth strategy. JPAN was launched on Sep 22, 2023 and is issued by Matthews.

data.title: Matthews Launches Five New Active ETFs to Provide Greater Customization in Emerging Markets
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO, Sept. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Matthews further enhanced its Emerging Markets leadership in Active ETFs today with the launch of five new actively managed exchange-traded funds (ETF...
